explore.name: explore
explore.description: Low-risk search, inventory, and repository discovery tasks.
explore.purpose: Use for cheap reconnaissance before deeper worker execution.
notes: Prefer cheaper model tiers and shallow search depth.
Do not use for final conclusions or verification verdicts.

worker.name: worker
worker.description: Primary task execution with required structured output.
worker.purpose: Use for implementation, analysis, or synthesis that must end in the worker contract.
notes: Worker output must keep Conclusion, Confirmed, Unconfirmed, Risks, and Next Step.
Do not collapse unresolved facts into confirmed conclusions.

verifier.name: verifier
verifier.description: Independent verification pass over worker output.
verifier.purpose: Use after worker completion to re-check claims, risks, and gaps with a stricter checklist.
notes: Fail closed if worker output omits evidence or drifts out of scope.
Verification is for independent review, not self-certification.
